context_strings: Enter max speed within the allowable range, between 65 km/h and max allowable speed of [X]
speed_limiter_intel.preconditions_string: Max allowable speed is not configured, the procedure is not supported by the engine control module.
speed_limiter_intel.usage: Send `31 01 DF [target_speed_km/h_low_byte] [target_speed_km/h_high_byte]` to set max speed limit. Requires extended diagnostic session (10 03) and SA unlock. ECM-side procedure.
speed_limiter_intel.caveat: ⚠ Some jurisdictions prohibit speed limiter modification. US: legal for off-road / track use. EU: illegal on public roads.

wastegate_strings: Wastegate Short trip manager status (only V8):
wastegate_supercharger_intel.note: AlfaOBD has READ-side support for Hellcat supercharger diagnostics. Write/set boost target requires PCM RAM map access (Mopar Villian territory — not in AlfaOBD).

traction_control_disable_intel.8_25_vs_9_25_abs: Hellcat platforms use either 8.25" or 9.25" rear with different traction control logic
